notes:
The game won't start, only the launcher.
First, after clicking "Play Game", a small error message box came up saying "DX11 feature level 10.0 is required to run the engine."
Then I installed the vulkan mesa drivers. Afterwards, the game seems to start with a black screen, ending in a crash with a longer error log, with the main error being "Direct3DDevice-
>CreateTexture2D(<function arguments here>) failed at .../Texture.cpp:471"

I tried disabling and enabling D3D11.
title: Empires Apart
